idea.title: Grain Road
idea.hook: Arbitrage grain between surplus and deficit Silk Road cities — but your own bulk purchases move prices against you, so greedy trading collapses your margin and starves the cities you neglect.
idea.prototype: Turn/route-based economic arbitrage: a map of Silk Road cities with supply/demand-driven grain prices; buy cheap, haul by caravan, sell dear, but your own bulk trades move the price against you.
idea.why_novel: market-impact pricing — your own bulk trades move the price against you
idea.non_timer_pressure: cash/resource scarcity + day-budget moves + loan interest + starving-city famine penalty (no countdown timer)
idea.lose_condition: gs='GAMEOVER' when cash < MIN_CASH (0) at a mandatory expense (day-end upkeep + interest + famine penalty)

sources.title: Grain Road
sources.snippet: Arbitrage grain between surplus and deficit Silk Road cities; bulk purchases move prices against you.

sources.title: Radar-style multi-platform scouting

synthesizer_brief: Top-ranked economic-trading opportunity (78.4, build_now); high-retention-ceiling genre; market-impact twist; built deep for a 10-min loop.
